text:
is an apparel brand spinoff of RADIO EVA. In 2025, the 30th anniversary of the airing of the Neon Genesis Evangelion series.

Overview

EVANGELION:95 uses the fashion scene of 1995 as the brand background, and develops graphic items that are close to the anime work, using scene cuts, title logos, character illustrations, etc. It expresses the quality required for an apparel brand through design, technology, and ideas that distinguish it from goods. https://magazine.radio-eva2.jp/posts/56197158?categoryIds=4130
